articles.author: Anthony Ha
articles.title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats - TechCrunch
articles.description: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.
articles.content:
Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri at the Worldwide Developers Conference in June, according to Bloombergs Mark Gurman.
The Siri relaunch is widely seen as Apples… [+917 chars]

articles.title: Deadly Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship Sparks Global Health Alert - SciTechDaily
articles.description: A rare hantavirus outbreak linked to a South Atlantic cruise is drawing global attention to the Andes strain’s unusual ability to spread between people.
articles.content: Hantaviruses are rodent-borne viruses that can cause serious lung or kidney disease in humans. Most infections occur through contact with contaminated rodent droppings, urine, or saliva, though rare … [+7624 chars]
